qwen.label: Qwen3-Coder-Next
qwen.notes: High-volume codegen/refactors/tests. Weak on terminal tasks (Terminal-Bench 36.2%). Cerebras entry is the 480B variant.

kimi.label: Kimi K3
kimi.notes: 1M ctx deep reasoning (~Opus tier). Expensive, slow (~34 tok/s), always-on thinking billed as output, frequent 429s.

deepseek.label: DeepSeek V4-Flash
deepseek.notes: Cheapest of the fleet (~Haiku tier). Fast debugging, diff review, boilerplate. DeepInfra fallback is V3.2-Exp (aider polyglot 74.5%, verified).

grok.label: Grok 4.5
grok.notes: xAI's latest (Jul 2026). Frontier coding/STEM generalist, good second-opinion model. OpenRouter only in v1.

glm.label: GLM-5.2
glm.notes: Best independently verified of the fleet (SWE-bench Pro 62.1%, #1 open-weight). Multi-step refactors, tool-use style output (~Sonnet 5 tier). SiliconFlow ID unverified.
